channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipped builder waste, 20th April
item.description:
Needs removing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carew Street, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light is facing the oppsite direction, 20th April
item.description:
The light in 360dgrees the wrong way - been like this for months. the lights facing the traffic coming from camberwell and in the middle of the road between bus garage and hotel
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clayton Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Between 2 Donaldson Road and next door car park, 20th April
item.description:
Dog mess on pavement outside car park next to 2 Donaldson Road. Please clean

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Donaldson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting, 20th April
item.description:
Revolutionary communist and other posters all over building. This is a beautiful refurbished area which would look so much better without the flyposting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, City North Place, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 16 years of this, 20th April
item.description:
16 years of this no camera no resolve, my Tax contribution is 55 k a month, i have moved all my business overseas, you who is reading this us part of this, so after the pound collapse just be aware you were as much apart of the collapse as any senior stakeholder.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Concorde Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 Anson Road, NW2 3UX, 20th April
item.description:
Parts of what looks like a bed (POPs)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Mountain of rubbish PLEASE INSTALL CCTV!!!!, 20th April
item.description:
Like every day. People throw rubbish in this alley used by pedestrians…this needs to stop! PLEASE INSTALL CCTV AND FINE THEM! It’s disgusting and disrespectful towards everyone else!!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morley Avenue, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 20th April
item.description:
Attracts gulls pigeons mice, health hazard!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Falmouth Road, Trinity St - overflowing litter bin, 20th April
item.description:
Please clear up as foxes/pigeons/rats are picking bags apart.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Falmouth Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo needs cleaning, 20th April
item.description:
Dog poo needs cleaning urgently and this happens frequently. Please put up signs asking for it to be cleaned up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Samuel Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 20th April
item.description:
This Audi A3 silver car has been abandoned here on Broomfield Road for over 2 months never moves right next to shell car charger
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broomfield Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black square freestanding litter bin by the bus shelter fronting 19, Goodwood Parade, Elmers End Green - bin fill and overflowing contents onto the public footway., 20th April
